summary: Excellent‑sounding BettyBoard capture of a 1976 show with great performances and an especially strong second set.
review: Fans rave about the wonderful audio quality of this recording, calling it crisp and next‑best‑to‑being‑there. The concert itself is praised for consistently great versions of the material, with the second set singled out as a highlight. No specific flaws or weak moments are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive (average 4.75 stars), highlighting excellent sound and solid performance; no negatives were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as wonderful, crisp, and 'next best thing to being there'; no technical issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is specifically praised as good; overall show is described as a treat with many great versions of tunes.
